title: Hara Hara Shankara Jaya Jaya Shankara
lyrics:
Hara hara shankara jaya jaya shankara..
Hara hara shankara palayamaam...
Shankar guruve sharanam.. sharanam mangala nayaka sharanam sharanam
Shiva rupe mama sharanam sharanam
Shakti rupe mama sharanam sharanam
Hara hara shankara jaya jaya shankara Hara hara shankara palayamaam
Vishnu rupe mama sharanam sharanam
Lakshmi rupe mama sharanam sharanam
Hara hara shankara jaya jaya shankara Hara hara shankara palayamaam
Brahma rupe mama sharanam sharanam
Saraswati rupe sharanam sharanam
Hara hara shankara jaya jaya shankara Hara hara shankara palayamaam
Ganapati rupe sharanam sharanam
Shanmugha rupe sharanam sharanam
Hara hara shankara jaya jaya shankara Hara hara shankara palayamaam
Sri Surya murte sharanam sharanam
Sri Chakra rupe sharanam sharanam
Hara hara shankara jaya jaya shankara Hara hara shankara palayamaam
Dakshina murthe sharanam sharanam
Hara hara shankara jaya jaya shankara
<<PAGE:192>>
Hara hara shankara jaya jaya shankara Hara hara shankara palayamaam
Hara hara shankara kamakshi shankara Jaya Jaya Shankara kanchi shankara
Hara hara shankara jaya jaya shankara
Hara hara shankara palayamaam Hara hara shankara
kaladi shankara Jaya Jaya Shankara kamakoti shankara
Hara hara shankara jaya jaya shankara Hara Hara shankara palayamaam
Hara hara shankara jaya jaya shankara Hara hara shankara palayamaam
Shankara guruve sharanam sharanam
Mangala nayaka sharanam sharanam
Hara hara shankara jaya jaya shankara......(10 times)
